result.preview:
"DuckDB query execution error (BinderException): Binder Error: Cannot compare values of type VARCHAR and type DATE - an explicit cast is required

LINE 7: WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= DATE '2022-06-25'
                                  ^"

args.query:
SELECT OwnerId AS agent_id, SUM(oli.Quantity * qli.UnitPrice) AS sales_amount
FROM Contract c
JOIN Opportunity o ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#',''))
JOIN Quote q ON TRIM(REPLACE(q.OpportunityId,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id,'#',''))
JOIN QuoteLineItem qli ON TRIM(REPLACE(qli.QuoteId,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(q.Id,'#',''))
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON TRIM(REPLACE(oli.Id,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(qli.OpportunityLineItemId,'#',''))
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= DATE '2022-06-25'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate <= DATE '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

JOIN Quote q ON TRIM(REPLACE(q.OpportunityId,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id,'#',''))
JOIN QuoteLineItem qli ON TRIM(REPLACE(qli.QuoteId,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(q.Id,'#',''))
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON TRIM(REPLACE(oli.Id,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(qli.OpportunityLineItemId,'#',''))
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= DATE '2022-06-25'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate <= DATE '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS agent_id, SUM(oli.Quantity * qli.UnitPrice) AS sales_amount
FROM Contract c
JOIN Opportunity o ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#',''))
JOIN Quote q ON TRIM(REPLACE(q.OpportunityId,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id,'#',''))
JOIN QuoteLineItem qli ON TRIM(REPLACE(qli.QuoteId,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(q.Id,'#',''))
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON TRIM(REPLACE(oli.Id,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(qli.OpportunityLineItemId,'#',''))
WHERE CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2022-06-25'
  AND CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) <= DATE '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT o.OwnerId AS agent_id,
       SUM(CAST(oli.Quantity AS DOUBLE) * CAST(qli.UnitPrice AS DOUBLE)) AS sales_amount
FROM Contract c
JOIN Opportunity o ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#',''))
JOIN Quote q ON TRIM(REPLACE(q.OpportunityId,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(o.Id,'#',''))
JOIN QuoteLineItem qli ON TRIM(REPLACE(qli.QuoteId,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(q.Id,'#',''))
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON TRIM(REPLACE(oli.Id,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(qli.OpportunityLineItemId,'#',''))
WHERE CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2022-06-25'
  AND CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE) <= DATE '2022-11-25'
GROUP BY o.OwnerId
ORDER BY sales_amount DESC
LIMIT 1;
